channel.title: 🏡 Thi Thao NGUYEN
channel.description: Recent content on 🏡 Thi Thao NGUYEN

item.title: P-Hacking
item.description: P-value is the probability of witnessing an event at least as extreme as our result. The smaller the p-value, the more evidence there is to reject H_0. Reduce p-value if you want to be extra-sure that you have good evidence to reject H_0. p-hacking collect a bunch of data test a bunch of different things and look for p-values <0.05 claim strong evidence for the things that have p-values <0.
